text:
Created attachment 183426
1

Turns out I have sent a previous version of the patch for the update, which assumes / prefix. This patch updates the paths and bumps PORTREVISION.

This is patch includes the changes which I use on 11.1-PRERELEASE. I have also verified the port to build on 10.3-RELEASE.

Sorry for the breakage, I tried to react fast :)
